signals.npcLine: Crypto tides barely shift—uncertainty shadows the digital bazaar.
signals.questPulse: Markets flicker in fear; balance teeters on cyber edge.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits pulse steady, with whispers of a fragile rally.
signals.clueEvent: Data spikes hint at a muted surge beneath neon lights.

signals.npcLine: Sentiment circuits glitch—crowds jittery, trust dissolving fast.
signals.questPulse: Fear index rising; watch for sudden market flashouts.
signals.worldFeed: Trading pods report calm before probable storm in crypto lines.
signals.clueEvent: Silent nodes pulse with cryptic chatter; stay alert.

signals.npcLine: New tokens glow faintly; PENGU and CHIP run cold trails.
signals.questPulse: Rising shadows around ASTEROID and RAVE, signals weakening trust.
signals.worldFeed: Coin echoes fade, as digital assets shuffle in streetlights.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle shifts on the grid hint at upcoming volatility.

signals.npcLine: Hunt the silent code—blockchain whispers lure data scavengers.
signals.questPulse: Seek the hidden pattern amid digital fear storm.
signals.worldFeed: Encrypted data streams flicker, secrets ripe for extraction.
signals.clueEvent: Trace patterns before market chaos unravels trading nodes.

signals.npcLine: Old netrunners warn—calm markets mask deeper undercurrents.
signals.questPulse: Shadow traders note subtle rises, prepare for rapid shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Silent exchanges rumble with muted anticipation and coded fear.
signals.clueEvent: Encoded signals from forgotten servers, a call to wary eyes.
